label: Transparent Pangolin motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on flat #ff00ff chroma key, then local remove_chroma_key.py alpha extraction with border auto-key, soft matte, and despill.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Pangolin transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated pangolin motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single pangolin in a calm curled protective pose, three-quarter view, full body visible, detailed overlapping armor scales, bronze brown and umber scale plates with subtle tan highlights, small dark eye, tapered snout, curved tail, natural anatomy. The motif should feel tactile, private, armored, careful, and suitable for an "armored privacy system" design language inspired by tropical woodland and pangolin scales.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full silhouette including tail and scale texture without cropping; one pangolin only.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves crisp scale edges, bronze brown warmth, soft natural shadows on the body only, and a clean silhouette for masking.
Transparent workflow: place the pangolin on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the pangolin fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the pangolin.
Constraints: no forest scene, no ground, no leaves, no extra animals, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no decorative background.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: true high-resolution 4K Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-pangolin/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive, sharp, high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Pangolin" / "Pangolin", an armored privacy system derived from the visible pangolin motif. This board must be suitable as a final catalog source image, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, minimum 2400px wide, crisp readable labels, no low-resolution preview.
Reference use: Use the visible pangolin cutout as the source of truth. Extract palette, scale texture rhythm, protective curved silhouette, tropical woodland context, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: bronze brown scale plates, umber armor shadow, tan scale highlights, leaf green accents, moss focus, warm ivory surfaces, and deep burrow ink.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 pixel composition, ultra sharp source asset, not a thumbnail.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Pangolin, Pangolin, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use guarded privacy-product UI type hierarchy with clear labels and strong numeric rhythm.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, access-control table, privacy audit tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: warm ivory and pale clay page background, layered scale cards with 8px radius, bronze-brown primary actions, leaf-green secure accents, umber text, moss focus rings, overlapping scale tab shapes, subtle etched armor texture, quiet privacy/security dashboard layout, tropical woodland leaf green used sparingly.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Pangolin".
Constraints: no forest photo scene, no repeated animal clutter, no sci-fi neon, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Pangolin".

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-pangolin/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Pangolin" / "Pangolin". It must feel like the same system translated from the visible light-mode Morphous Pangolin board and the same pangolin motif, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent pangolin motif and visible light board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, overlapping scale rhythm, protective curved silhouette, privacy dashboard layout, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. Translate warm ivory and pale clay surfaces into deep burrow ink and charcoal umber surfaces, with ivory text, bronze primary, leaf green secure accents, moss focus rings, tan highlights, and restrained armor-edge glow.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Pangolin, Pangolin, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use guarded privacy-product UI type hierarchy with clear labels and strong numeric rhythm.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, access-control table, privacy audit tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep burrow ink background, dark umber cards with bronze scale borders, luminous bronze primary actions, leaf-green secure accents, tan data highlights, moss focus rings, ivory foreground, overlapping scale tab shapes, subtle etched armor texture, 8px radii, quiet high-trust privacy/security dashboard layout.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Pangolin".
Constraints: no forest photo scene, no repeated animal clutter, no sci-fi neon, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Pangolin".
